cent: noun. A subunit of currency equal to one-hundredth of the main unit of currency in many countries.

cone: noun. A surface of revolution formed by rotating a segment of a line around another line that intersects the first line.

core: noun. In general usage, an essential part of a thing surrounded by other essential things.
corn: noun. Any cereal plant (or its grain) that is the main crop or staple of a country or region.
cornet: noun. A musical instrument of the brass family, slightly smaller than a trumpet, usually in the musical key of B-flat.

eon: noun. Eternity, the duration of the universe.

teen: noun. Synonym of teenager: a person between 13 and 19 years old (inclusive).

tenor: noun. A musical range or section higher than bass and lower than alto.
tenrec: noun. Any of several diverse small mammals, of the family Tenrecidae, many native to Madagascar.
toe: symbol. Former ISO 639-3 language code for Tomedes.
ton: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Tongan.
toner: noun. Powder used in laser printers and photocopiers to form the text and images on the printed paper.
tor: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Togbo-Vara Banda.
